# Yalla Ads — يلا ادز
> وكالة تسويق رقمي عربية — Arabic-first digital marketing agency

## Overview
Yalla Ads (يلا ادز) is a digital marketing agency that specializes in helping Arabic-speaking businesses grow their online presence and reach the right customers. Our slogan is "منوصلك للزبون الصحيح" (We connect you to the right customer).

We offer comprehensive digital marketing solutions including Google Ads management, social media management, search engine optimization, content creation, and lead generation services.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://yalla-ads.com
- Email: info@yalla-ads.com
- Instagram: @yallaadss (https://instagram.com/yallaadss)
- Languages: Arabic (Shami and Khaleeji dialects), English

## Services

### 1. Google Ads (إعلانات قوقل)
Full-service Google Ads management including:
- Search Ads — appear at the top of Google search results
- Display Ads — visual banners across partner websites
- YouTube Ads — video advertising on YouTube
- Shopping Ads — product listings with images and prices
- Continuous campaign optimization
- Weekly performance reports

### 2. Social Media Management (إدارة السوشال ميديا)
Our flagship service. Complete social media management:
- Monthly content planning and strategy
- Professional post design for each platform
- Management of Instagram, TikTok, and Snapchat accounts
- Content scheduling and publishing
- Comment and message management
- Monthly performance reports

### 3. SEO (تحسين محركات البحث)
Search engine optimization services:
- Keyword research and analysis
- Content optimization for Arabic search
- Technical SEO improvements
- Backlink building
- Site speed and performance optimization
- Monthly ranking reports

### 4. Content Creation (صناعة المحتوى)
Professional content production:
- Graphic design
- Short-form video production (Reels, TikTok)
- Marketing copywriting in Arabic
- Product photography
- Visual brand identity design
- Blog articles and long-form content

### 5. Lead Generation (جذب العملاء)
Complete lead generation systems:
- Professional landing page design
- Lead generation campaigns
- Marketing automation setup
- Lead tracking and CRM integration
- Conversion rate optimization

## Regions Served
Saudi Arabia (KSA), United Arab Emirates (UAE), Kuwait, Jordan, and the broader Middle East region.

## Site Structure
- Home: https://yalla-ads.com/ — Overview, services, how we work, blog preview
- Services: https://yalla-ads.com/services/ — Detailed service descriptions
- About: https://yalla-ads.com/about/ — Company story, values, team stats
- Blog: https://yalla-ads.com/blog/ — Marketing tips and strategies in Arabic
- Contact: https://yalla-ads.com/contact/ — Contact form and information

## Blog Articles
- "ليش السوشال ميديا ضرورية لمشروعك في ٢٠٢٦" — Why social media is essential for your business
- "دليلك الشامل لإعلانات قوقل للمبتدئين" — Complete Google Ads guide for beginners
- "٧ أسرار لصناعة محتوى يجذب العملاء" — 7 secrets to creating content that attracts customers
- "أساسيات تحسين محركات البحث (SEO) لمشروعك" — SEO basics for your business

## Brand
- Colors: Orange (#E67E22) and Navy Blue (#1B2E6E)
- Logo: Play button triangle shape with "Yalla ADS" text
- Font: Tajawal (Arabic)
- Design: Glassmorphism, modern, responsive, RTL
- Tagline: منوصلك للزبون الصحيح (We connect you to the right customer)
